failed_attempts.sql:
WITH bakery_profiles AS (
    SELECT id AS profile_id
    FROM profile
    WHERE biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'bakery | bread | pastry | cake')
),
influencer_profiles AS (
    SELECT id AS profile_id
    FROM profile
    WHERE num_followers > 10000
)
SELECT DISTINCT p.profile_id, p.username, p.num_followers
FROM profile p
JOIN profile_relationship pr ON p.id = pr.destination_profile_id
JOIN influencer_profiles i ON pr.origin_profile_id = i.profile_id
JOIN bakery_profiles b ON p.id = b.profile_id
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error:
column p.profile_id does not exist
LINE 11: SELECT DISTINCT p.profile_id, p.username, p.num_followers
                         ^
HINT:  Perhaps you meant to reference the column "i.profile_id" or the column "b.profile_id".
